result.summary: Found 3 visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated navigation items, cut-off game card content, and a partially visible game title.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation bar truncates items on the right side — 'Hot Ga...' is visibly cut off, indicating the navigation carousel or scroll container is not properly showing all items or indicating there are more items to scroll to.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator or arrow button on the right side of the navigation bar to signal to users that more categories are available. Ensure the last visible item is not partially clipped.

issues.description: Game cards in the third column are cut off on the right edge throughout the page (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'). Game titles and artwork are partially hidden, making them unrecognizable.
issues.suggestion: Add a clear visual affordance (e.g., a gradient fade or a visible arrow) on the right edge to indicate horizontal scrollability. Ensure partial cards are consistently cut to at least 50% visibility so users understand there is more content to scroll to.

issues.description: The third exclusive game card in the top row shows a partially visible title 'MAGNI PHO...' which is unreadable and provides no meaningful information to the user.
issues.suggestion: Ensure game titles are fully readable when cards are partially visible, or use a tooltip/overlay on hover/tap to show the full game name.
